[false ; n] ; let mut remaining = n ; while remaining > 0 { let before = progress () ; let pending : Vec < usize > = (0 .. n) . filter (| & i | ! done [i]) . collect () ; let taken : Vec < Box < dyn PollTask + Send > > = pending . iter () . map (| & i | std :: mem :: replace (& mut tasks [i] , Box :: new (AlreadyDone))) . collect () ; let jobs : Vec < _ > = taken . into_iter () . map (| mut t | { move | | { let became_done = matches ! (t . poll () , Step :: Done) ; (t , became_done) } }) . collect () ; let results = scheduler . run_indexed (jobs , None , None) ; let mut advanced = false ; for (& i , (t , became_done)) in pending . iter () . zip (results) { tasks [i] = t ; if became_done { done [i] = true ; remaining -= 1 ; advanced = true ; } } if ! advanced && progress () == before && remaining > 0 { return Err (Deadlock :: new (remaining)) ; } } Ok (()) }
